metadata.title: Belcova — VAT Refund for Tourists in France
metadata.description: Belcova simplifies VAT refunds for tourists shopping in France. Get up to 80% back, tracked in real-time from purchase to payout.

hero.subtitle: Belcova handles your tax-free refund from purchase to payout.

how.title: How it works
how.s1d: Buy from any store in France with Belcova.
how.s2d: Scan your receipts at the airport PABLO kiosk.
how.s3d: Refund hits your account within 5 days.

value.r1d: See your refund status in real-time. From purchase to payout, nothing is hidden.
value.r2d: The industry gives you 50–60%. Belcova gives you more. Transparent fees, no surprises.
value.r3d: Scan at any PABLO kiosk. We handle the rest before your flight boards.

mock.phoneSub: Show this QR code to the PABLO kiosk

compare.title: Belcova vs. traditional operators
compare.subtitle: See how we stack up against legacy VAT refund services.

retail.title: Partner with Belcova
retail.body: Offer tax-free shopping to every tourist who walks through your door. Zero hardware, zero complexity.

footer.tagline: The modern way to get your VAT back.

modal.title: Get notified at launch.
modal.body: Belcova opens the moment our Douanes agrément clears. Drop your email — you'll be first in line.
modal.success: Thanks. We'll be in touch soon.
modal.consent: By submitting, you agree to be contacted by Belcova. No spam.

blog.title: The Belcova journal
blog.sub: Guides, analysis, and behind the scenes on VAT refunds in France.

cookies.title: Cookie preferences
cookies.message: We use cookies for analytics to improve your experience. No personal data is sold.
